overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a horror-survival game showing a character exploring a dimly lit house. The character moves through a kitchen, living room with atmospheric dust particles, and enters a bathroom, featuring cinematic lighting and detailed environmental storytelling.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the kitchen counter, examining the cluttered surfaces and shelves

entered.detail: cluttered countertop with various items and appliances
white microwave sitting on the counter
shelves mounted on the wall holding dishes and containers
tall refrigerator unit in the corner

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit kitchen. The countertop is cluttered with a microwave and various items, while shelves above hold kitchen supplies. A refrigerator stands in the corner as the character progresses toward the living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with furniture and streaming window light

events.description: exits kitchen into larger living room area
approaches bright window with visible dust particles illuminated in light beams

agents.ego_description: walking through the living room toward the far window where warm light streams in

entered.detail: wooden dining table with items on surface
blue chair near the center of the room
large window streaming bright warm light into the room
tall bookshelf against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious living room with wooden floors. A dining table sits to the right while a bright window at the far end casts warm light beams through atmospheric dust particles. The character walks toward this light source, passing a blue chair and bookshelf.

events.description: turns left and enters the bathroom through a doorway
stops at the bathroom sink and looks down to examine it

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and approaching the sink to examine it closely

entered.detail: white porcelain sink with wooden countertop and faucet
white toilet with tank against the right wall
mirror above the sink reflecting the room
small window above the toilet showing outdoor greenery

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow bathroom with tiled floors. The space contains a sink with a mirror above it, a toilet beneath a small window, and various bathroom fixtures. The character approaches the sink and stops to examine it closely in the dim light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dimly lit kitchen into a sun-drenched living area before settling in a claustrophobic bathroom. It begins by navigating a narrow kitchen space cluttered with countertops and shelving, moving past a refrigerator toward the open living area. As the camera enters the spacious room, the environment shifts from shadow to warmth, gliding across wooden floors and past a blue chair toward bright beams of light filtering through atmospheric dust. The scene then turns away from the light and narrows once more as it enters a tiled bathroom. Finally, the camera approaches a sink and mirror, coming to a halt to examine the fixtures in the dim light.
